sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100764" key="sunodopanse/lhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνοδοπανσέληνος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n100764.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conjunction</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).199</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συζυγία</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
